Allbirds Vietnam · A memory keeper

To the people who made every day worth showing up for

This isn't a goodbye. It's a thank you — for the laughs, the shared lunches, the factory floors, and everything in between. These memories belong to all of us.

With love and gratitude — Aidan Lam 

↓ scroll

01

The Tet party that had everything

This was my very first Tết party with Allbirds — truly warm, joyful, and full of laughter. I got to sing lô tô and join some lucky games (even though I didn’t win anything 😄).

Áo dài, bánh chưng, confetti signs, and the whole flock together. This illustrated Tết moment captured something real — the warmth, the colour, and the pride of being Allbirds Vietnam.

“I love Allbirds” has never felt more true than it did in that room

02

Appreciate to my leader and fellow partners

I would like to express my deepest appreciation to Clare — my leader, my instructor, and also a friend — who has always supported and stood by us through every obstacle.

I’m also truly grateful to my fellow partners in Vietnam. I know I can be quite complicated, demanding, and challenging at times, so thank you for your patience and for always staying united.

I’d also like to express my appreciation to chị Alice, who guided me through the handover and supported me whenever I faced difficulties.

Lastly, I sincerely appreciate my overseeing partners, Jennifer and Stephanie, who have helped me so much in performing well in this role. I’ve learned a lot from all of you.

I will truly miss you all.

03

Raise a glass — to all of us

Glasses up, áo dài on, hearts full. Clare is speaking from the front and every single person in that room is listening. This toast carried so much — gratitude, pride, hope. I will never forget the warmth of that evening.

04

One room, one team, one moment

The full picture — the whole room mid-toast. This is what it looked like when we celebrated each other~~

05

A certificate. A name. A memory.

I’m so happy (and a little proud 😄) to be recognized as the most on-time “bird.” Since joining Allbirds, I’ve truly learned how to balance work and life — to play hard and work smart.

Thank you, Allbirds, for making this journey so meaningful.

06

Flowers and a full heart

Being part of the organizing team during this time was both joyful and exhausting — but seeing everyone truly enjoy the moment made it all worth it.

And thank you, Clare, for the unexpected gift.

Rose flower bouquets, big smiles, and a quiet moment of being seen and celebrated. To receive flowers at the end of something is to be told: your time here was beautiful.

It truly was.

07

My first Christmas with the Flock

My very first Christmas with the Allbirds flock — a day of togetherness, laughter, and shared moments that felt like home.

08

Under the sign we called home

Hearts, peace signs, wide grins — all of us crowded under the Allbirds neon. This sign meant something. It meant mornings with purpose, afternoons with energy, and a team that genuinely cared about the work.

I know I’ll miss these moments a lot — celebrating together right in front of the Allbirds logo.

09

Laptop out. Warehouse on.

I wasn’t in air conditioning — I was down on the factory floor, packing boxes alongside the team, learning the process, and sharing how Allbirds does things.

It wasn’t about comfort. It was about showing up. No glamour, just real work — the kind that taught me, shaped me, and kept everything moving.

10

My first business trip, explore the world of shoe

My first business trip, and the first time I truly saw how a pair of shoes comes to life.

Standing there at Shingtak Group, watching the process up close — it made everything feel more real. Not just the product, but the people, the effort, and the journey behind it.

A long way from home, doing meaningful work together — and learning more than I ever expected

A note from Aidan

Working alongside each of you has been one of the greatest gifts of my time at Allbirds. 

With love and gratitude · Aidan Lam · Allbirds Vietnam

1 year
1st Birdiversary · Allbirds Vietnam

A year of memories, carried forward

"The balloon said 1 — but what we built together
is worth so much more than a number."

Thank you.

For every day, every meeting, every laugh, every shipment, every celebration that somehow became a memory. This time here was a gift — and it was a gift because of you all.

With all my heart — Aidan Lam · Allbirds Vietnam

Thank you, from the bottom of my heart.

Allbirds Vietnam · Always in memory
